title: Replay Result
description: Governed artifact produced by the BN–BP Replay Engine describing the outcome of replaying a prior execution trace.

schema_version.description: Schema version for the replay result artifact.

replay_id.description: Unique identifier for this replay run (UUID-4).

source_trace_id.description: The trace_id of the original execution being replayed.

replayed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the replay was executed.

status.description: Overall replay outcome. 'blocked' means prerequisites were not met.

prerequisites_valid.description: Whether all prerequisites were satisfied before replay execution began.

prerequisite_errors.description: List of prerequisite validation errors. Empty when prerequisites_valid is true.

steps_executed.description: Ordered list of replay steps that were executed.

step_index.description: Zero-based index of this step within the replay.

span_name.description: Name of the span being replayed.

replayed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this step was replayed.

error_message.description: Error detail when status is error or blocked.

output_comparison.description: Comparison of replay outputs against original outputs.

compared.description: Whether an output comparison was performed.

matched.description: Whether replay outputs matched original outputs. Null if not compared.

differences.description: List of detected differences. Empty when matched is true.

field.description: JSON path or field name where the difference was found.

determinism_notes.description: Notes about non-deterministic elements encountered during replay.

context.description: Optional replay context metadata (e.g. triggered_by, replay_mode).
